description: Create a smooth animation of a character sliding from Left to Right over 24 frames using the asset at /home/ga/Desktop/asset.tif. Apply 'Ease In' and 'Ease Out' (Slow In / Slow Out) motion interpolation so the character starts slow, accelerates, and slows down at the end. Render the animation as a PNG sequence to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/ease_test/.
